1.q: Is School's Out! free for parents?
1.a: Yes. Always free for parents. No credit card, no paywall. We may eventually charge camps for Featured placement — never families.

2.q: How do you pick which camps to list?
2.a: Every camp is manually reviewed. We check the website, confirm the ages and location, and only list operators running real programs in the neighborhoods we cover.

3.q: Does School's Out! take a cut of camp bookings?
3.a: No. We're a directory, not a broker. Parents book directly on the camp's website. Camp operators keep 100% of every booking.

4.q: Will my family data be shared?
4.a: No. Kid data stays on your device per our COPPA-aligned design. The only data we store on our server is the email you give us for closure reminders — and you can unsubscribe any time.

5.q: What if my kid's school isn't listed?
5.a: Use the city request form above. Tell us the city (and your email) and we'll email you the moment we add your school or expand coverage.

6.a: Noah (age 8) and his dad, in Coral Gables. Noah sketched the first version on a napkin during Spring Break 2025 — when every camp was already sold out.

noah.title: Meet Noah, our 8-year-old founder
noah.p1: Noah is an 8-year-old 2nd grader in Coral Gables. Every time school was out, he watched his parents scramble. One night he looked up and asked, "Dad, why isn't there just an app?"
noah.p2: His dad is a developer. They built the first version together. Noah picks the emojis, names the closures, writes camp blurbs, and runs the product review meetings.
noah.quote: Making an app is like making a super-fun plan, but for everyone.
noah.photoTodo: Photo coming soon — with a parent's permission.

body.p1: Hi, I'm Noah. I'm 8 years old. I live in Miami. I build websites and apps — some for fun, some to help people.
body.vibeCode: I vibe-coded the first version of School's Out! in Claude in spring of 2026 with my dad's help.
body.p2: I made School's Out! because my dad runs a business and whenever my school closed he had to stop everything and figure out what to do with me. I watched him scramble a lot. I thought: someone should just fix this for every parent.
body.p4: School's Out! tracks real school calendars. It knows which camps are open, which are full, and which cost what. When a day off is coming, we tell you early — and we already have a plan ready, so you don't have to build one from scratch at 10pm the night before.
body.p5: If this app made your life a little easier today, that's the whole point.

links.mottoTitle: Be so good, nobody can ignore you.

whySection.p1: Miami parents come here when school's out — every closure, every break, every teacher workday. We're becoming the one place parents check before planning.
whySection.p2: When they need a camp, they're already here. Be the one they find first.

howWeVerify.title: How we verify
howWeVerify.subtitle: What we promise, how verification actually works, and where the data comes from.

promise.title: What we promise
promise.body: Every camp listing on School's Out! is reviewed before it goes public. Every school calendar entry has a source we can point to. If something's wrong, tell us and we'll fix it within 2 business days.

howItWorks.title: How verification actually works
howItWorks.body: We use an AI assistant (Claude) to research camps and parse school calendar PDFs. Then a human reviews the results before anything goes live. The AI is faster than a human; the human catches what the AI gets wrong. Both are necessary.

camps.label: Camps
camps.body: Each camp's own website is the primary source. We capture the URL we pulled the data from. You can see it on every camp's detail page.

calendars.label: School calendars
calendars.body: Miami-Dade County Public Schools — directly from the district's published PDF. Private schools — directly from each school's own PDF or website.

notVerified.label: What we don't verify
notVerified.body: Sitter quality (we link to Care.com — they do their own background checks). Cruise pricing (it changes daily). Anything labeled "External" on our site.

schedule.title: Re-verification schedule
schedule.body: Every camp gets re-checked every 90 days. If a camp's website goes down or their hours change, we update the listing or flag it.

help.title: Help us stay accurate
help.body: Found wrong info? Tell us. Every page has a "Got an idea?" button. We read every message.

cta.heading: Want a reminder before every break?
cta.sub: One email before Memorial Day, Labor Day, spring break, teacher workdays. No spam.

cities.title: Browse by city
cities.subtitle: We're starting small and verifying every school by hand.
cities.currentNote: Every public-school closure across the county, plus a growing list of independent schools.
cities.requestBody: Tell us where your kid goes to school. We'll email you the moment we add calendars for your area.

howItWorks.title: How School's Out! works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps, no paywall, zero ads.

step1.title: 1. Get reminded
step1.body: Give us your email and we'll send you a note 2 weeks, 1 week, and 3 days before every Miami school closure on your kid's calendar.

step2.title: 2. Browse verified camps
step2.body: Every camp in our directory is manually reviewed. No fake listings, no affiliate links, no "sponsored" slots pretending to be editorial picks.

step3.title: 3. Plan your day
step3.body: Create a free account to save camps, share plans with a co-parent, and build a break-by-break schedule your kids will actually enjoy.

campDetail.limitedDisclaimer: We're still verifying this listing. Tap "List your camp" if you're the operator or know the owner — we review updates within 2 business days.

ctaSignup.heading: Get reminded before every closure this camp could fill.
ctaSignup.sub: Free account. One email before every Miami school break.
